nodes.name: WooCommerce Order Webhook
nodes.notes: Register in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > Webhooks. Topic: order.created. URL: https://YOUR_N8N_DOMAIN/webhook/woo-order-created

parameters.subject: =New Order #{{ $json.order_number }} — {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.order_total }} ({{ $json.customer_name }})
parameters.message:
=

New Order Received

{{ $json.is_flagged ? '' : '' }}
Order #{{ $json.order_number }}
Customer{{ $json.customer_name }} ({{ $json.customer_email }})
Total{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.order_total }}
Payment{{ $json.payment_method_title }}
Items{{ $json.line_items.map(i => i.product_name + ' x' + i.quantity).join(', ') }}
FLAGS' + $json.flags.join(' | ') + '

nodes.name: Order Review Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives Approve / Hold / Cancel clicks from the #order-review Slack message

parameters.responseBody: =Order status successfully changed to: {{ $json.status }}. Now you can close this tab.

nodes.name: WooCommerce Order Updated Webhook
nodes.notes: Register in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > Webhooks. Topic: order.updated. URL: https://YOUR_N8N_DOMAIN/webhook/woo-order-updated

nodes.name: Problem Order Webhook
nodes.notes:
Register TWO WooCommerce webhooks pointing here:
1. Topic: order.updated (status = failed)
2. You can also POST manually from Flow 1 review if cancelled
URL: https://YOUR_N8N_DOMAIN/webhook/woo-order-problem

parameters.subject: =URGENT: {{ $json.problem_type.replace(/_/g,' ').toUpperCase() }} — Order #{{ $json.order_number }}
parameters.message:
=

Urgent: {{ $json.problem_type }} on Order #{{ $json.order_number }}

Customer{{ $json.customer_name }} ({{ $json.customer_email }})
Total{{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.order_total }}
Severity{{ $json.severity }}
Action Needed{{ $json.action_needed }}

parameters.subject: =We are following up on your order #{{ $json.order_number }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.customer_name || 'there' }},

We noticed there was an issue processing payment for your order #{{ $json.order_number }}.

Please update your payment details or contact us and we will be happy to assist.

Your cart is saved and ready when you are.

Sorry for the inconvenience.

parameters.subject: =[Action Required] Daily Order Audit — {{ $json.stuck_processing + $json.stuck_on_hold + $json.open_problems }} issue(s) need attention
parameters.message:
=

Daily Order Audit — {{ $json.date }}

The following issues need your attention today:

    {{ $json.stuck_processing > 0 ? '
  • ' + $json.stuck_processing + ' order(s) stuck in processing over 48 hours
    • ' : '' }}{{ $json.stuck_on_hold > 0 ? '
  • ' + $json.stuck_on_hold + ' order(s) on hold over 24 hours
    • ' : '' }}{{ $json.open_problems > 0 ? '
  • ' + $json.open_problems + ' unresolved problem order(s)
    • ' : '' }}{{ $json.open_flagged > 0 ? '
  • ' + $json.open_flagged + ' flagged order(s) awaiting review
    • ' : '' }}

Revenue yesterday: {{ $json.revenue_yesterday }} ({{ $json.orders_yesterday }} orders)

parameters.text: =:package: *Restocked* — {{ $json.product_name }} (SKU: {{ $json.sku }}) +{{ $json.qty_returned }} units returned to stock (now {{ $json.new_stock }}) from cancelled Order #{{ $json.order_number }}

updateFields.customerNote: Order reviewed and approved by team.
=Order {{ $json.action === 'hold' ? 'put on hold' : 'cancelled' }} by team after review.
